how_it_works: Keystone passives fundamentally change how a build works — each has a powerful positive effect paired with a significant trade-off. Some builds require specific keystones to function; others are completely broken by them.
tips: Read both the effect AND the trade-off before taking a keystone — the trade-off can kill a poorly-prepared build.
Some keystones are available via unique items (e.g. Resolute Technique via Lycosidae shield) — you don't always need to path to them.
Eldritch Battery and Blood Magic together are incompatible — EB converts ES to mana, BM converts mana to life.

keystones.name: Resolute Technique
keystones.effect: Your attacks never miss.
keystones.trade_off: Cannot deal critical strikes with attacks.
builds_that_need: High base damage builds that don't scale crits
Cyclone (low accuracy bases)
Slayer (Headsman synergy)
breaks_for: Any crit-based attack build
Inquisitor physical crits
keystones.notes: Worth taking when your attack accuracy would be low or crit scaling is impractical. Some builds access it via unique items (Lycosidae).

keystones.name: Iron Reflexes
keystones.effect: Converts all Evasion Rating to Armour. Dexterity no longer provides bonus Evasion Rating.
keystones.trade_off: Cannot Evade enemy attacks. Dexterity bonus to Evasion Rating lost.
builds_that_need: Armour-stacking builds needing evasion nodes for Armour
Molten Shell-focused builds
breaks_for: Evasion builds
Dodge + Evasion hybrid builds
Raider (Phasing relies on Evade chance)
keystones.notes: Converts the entire Evasion Rating stat pool into Armour — useful when you have both evasion and armour nodes but want to maximise one mitigation type.

keystones.name: Chaos Inoculation
keystones.effect: Maximum Life becomes 1. Immune to Chaos Damage.
keystones.trade_off: 1 maximum life — instant death from any physical hit if ES drops.
builds_that_need: Energy Shield builds wanting Chaos immunity
Occultist
Trickster
Elementalist CI
breaks_for: Any life-based build
Hybrid ES/life builds
keystones.notes: Requires 5000+ ES to play safely. Paired with Ghost Reaver and Vaal Pact for ES on hit/leech. CI completely removes the Chaos damage threat in PoE endgame.

keystones.name: Eldritch Battery
keystones.effect: Spend Energy Shield before Mana for Skill Costs. Energy Shield does not recharge while this is in effect.
keystones.trade_off: ES does not recharge while you have mana. ES protects mana, not ES pool directly.
builds_that_need: High-cost skill builds that drain mana (e.g. Spark)
Hierophant mana builds
Builds with Mind over Matter + EB combo
breaks_for: CI builds (you lose the ES buffer)
ES-based defensive builds relying on recharge
keystones.notes: Often combined with Mind Over Matter for a triple-layered defence: Life → Mana (from MoM) → ES (from EB). Complex but powerful mana sustain.

keystones.name: Blood Magic
keystones.effect: Skills cost Life instead of Mana. Removes the Mana pool.
keystones.trade_off: No mana pool — all skill costs come from life. Cannot use mana or mana-based mechanics.
builds_that_need: High-leech builds that sustain life easily
Warcry Berserker (life cost warcries)
breaks_for: CI builds
MoM builds
Any build relying on mana flask recovery
keystones.location: Left side of tree between Marauder/Witch
keystones.notes: Berserker's Warbringer notable works specifically with Blood Magic. Very rare as a tree-taken keystone — most builds don't want to drain life for skill costs.

keystones.name: Elemental Equilibrium
keystones.effect: Enemies you hit with elemental damage receive a debuff: +25% resistance to that element but -50% resistance to other elements.
keystones.trade_off: Your hits must avoid dealing the same element as your main damage type, or you BUFF enemy resistance.
builds_that_need: Ignite builds using Herald of Ice + Orb of Storms to apply cold/lightning first
EE-designed builds that alternate elements
breaks_for: Any build that deals mixed elements without careful setup
Builds using multiple elemental damage types
keystones.notes: Requires careful gem setup — triggers only work with the right element ordering. Most commonly used in ignite builds with non-fire triggerers.

keystones.name: Elemental Overload
keystones.effect: 40% more Elemental Damage if you've dealt a Critical Strike in the past 8 seconds.
keystones.trade_off: Elemental ailments (ignite, shock, freeze, chill) have no effect from your hits.
builds_that_need: Elemental builds that want damage but don't scale ignite/shock/freeze
Arc/Storm Brand Inquisitor
Freezing Pulse builds that don't need chill value
breaks_for: Ignite builds
Shock-stacking builds
Freeze/shatter builds relying on ailment damage
keystones.notes: Easy to maintain with any crit chance — just needs 1 crit in 8 seconds. Useful when you want elemental damage bonuses without committing to full crit scaling.

keystones.name: Pain Attunement
keystones.effect: 30% more Spell Damage when on Low Life (below 35% life).
keystones.trade_off: Must stay at low life — inherently dangerous, requires careful management.
builds_that_need: Lowlife spell builds with Shavronne's Wrappings
CI + LL combo (theoretical)
Glass cannon builds accepting the risk
breaks_for: Any build that wants to maintain full life for damage bonuses
Juggernaut (high life pool is the point)
keystones.notes: Historically paired with Shavronne's Wrappings (chaos damage doesn't bypass ES) for safe low-life operation. 30% more spell damage is a very large bonus.

keystones.name: Acrobatics
keystones.effect: 30% chance to Dodge Attack Hits. 50% less Armour and Energy Shield.
keystones.trade_off: Halves Armour and ES — heavily penalises hybrid defences.
builds_that_need: Evasion-primary builds (Raider, Deadeye, Ranger)
Any build taking Phase Acrobatics
breaks_for: Armour builds
Energy Shield builds
Any hybrid defence build
keystones.notes: Dodge chance is powerful but inconsistent — works against all attacks uniformly. Must commit to evasion as primary layer since armour and ES are gutted.

keystones.name: Phase Acrobatics
keystones.effect: 30% chance to Dodge Spell Hits.
keystones.trade_off: Requires Acrobatics — inherits its -50% Armour and ES penalty.
builds_that_need: Evasion + Dodge builds wanting full attack and spell dodge
Raider (Quartz Infusion adds dodge)
Trickster (Ghost Dance adds dodge stacks)
breaks_for: Any build not already using Acrobatics
keystones.notes: Always taken alongside Acrobatics. Together they provide 30% attack dodge + 30% spell dodge, which is a strong layer when combined with Evasion base.

keystones.name: Unwavering Stance
keystones.effect: Cannot be stunned.
keystones.trade_off: Cannot Evade attacks.
builds_that_need: Slow-hitting melee builds vulnerable to stun lock
Juggernaut has this built-in via Unstoppable
breaks_for: Evasion builds that rely on Evade chance
keystones.notes: Stun immunity is extremely valuable for melee builds. Most often outclassed by Juggernaut's Unstoppable notable, which doesn't require pathing to this keystone.

keystones.name: Ghost Reaver
keystones.effect: Leech applies to Energy Shield instead of Life. 50% reduced ES recharge rate.
keystones.trade_off: Reduced ES recharge rate means ES recovery is entirely leech-dependent.
builds_that_need: CI + Vaal Pact builds (ES leech)
Occultist or Trickster with ES leech on gear
breaks_for: ES builds relying on fast ES recharge (e.g. Trickster's Ghost Dance)
keystones.notes: Essential for CI builds that want active leech sustain rather than waiting for ES recharge. Pairs with Vaal Pact for instant ES leech.

keystones.name: Vaal Pact
keystones.effect: Life Leech is instant. Life regeneration has no effect.
keystones.trade_off: No life regeneration — poisons, burning ground, and degens cannot be outlasted via regen.
builds_that_need: High-leech melee builds needing instant recovery under pressure
Slayer (Brutal Fervour already has strong leech)
Berserker (Aspect of Carnage damage trades need leech)
breaks_for: Builds using Immortal Call + regen cycling
Low-leech builds that rely on regen for sustain
Any build with important regen mechanics (The Agnostic)
keystones.notes: Instant leech is among the strongest defensive mechanics in the game under heavy sustained damage. Regen loss is a significant downside — ensure alternate sustain exists.

keystones.name: Ancestral Bond
keystones.effect: Can have 1 additional Totem. Cannot deal damage with skills yourself.
keystones.trade_off: You personally deal zero damage — all DPS must come from totems.
builds_that_need: Totem builds (Hierophant + Ancestral Bond for 5 totems)
Warchief/Ballista totem builds
Any build fully committing to totems
breaks_for: Any non-totem build
Hybrid melee + totem builds
keystones.notes: Hierophant + Ancestral Bond = 4 totems from Ascendancy + 1 from this keystone = 5 simultaneous totems. The ultimate totem damage multiplier.

keystones.name: Iron Will
keystones.effect: Strength's Damage Bonus applies to Spell Damage.
keystones.trade_off: No trade-off — purely additive. Requires high Strength.
builds_that_need: High-Strength spell builds (Templar, Scion with Strength focus)
SRS builds (Strength often stacked for minion bonuses)
Glacial Hammer or Sunder builds adding spell overlap
breaks_for: Nothing directly — but opportunity cost of pathing here vs other nodes
keystones.notes: Strength gives 0.2% increased spell damage per point, so 300 Strength = +60% spell damage. Very strong if Strength is already high for other reasons.

keystones.name: Mindless Aggression
keystones.effect: N/A — this is a Necromancer Ascendancy notable, not a keystone.
keystones.trade_off: N/A
builds_that_need: Necromancer minion builds
keystones.notes: Listed here for reference — not a passive tree keystone but frequently confused as one.

keystones.name: The Agnostic
keystones.effect: While not at maximum Mana, continuously recover Life equal to 2% of your Mana Regeneration Rate.
keystones.trade_off: Cannot Recover Mana over time (no regen, no flask recovery, no mana leech — only instant mana gain).
builds_that_need: High mana pool + regen builds wanting permanent life sustain
Inquisitor or Hierophant with Sanctuary of Thought (huge mana regen)
breaks_for: Any build relying on mana flasks or leech for mana recovery
Builds with Eldritch Battery (EB prevents mana regen from restoring mana normally)
keystones.location: Centre of tree — near Witch/Shadow junction
keystones.notes: Translates mana regeneration into life regeneration. With 3000+ mana regen, provides 60+ life per second. Extremely powerful with high mana investments.

keystones.name: Perfect Agony
keystones.effect: Modifiers to Critical Strike Multiplier also apply to Damage over Time Multiplier (at 30% of value). Ailments only deal damage based on the base damage of the skill.
keystones.trade_off: Ailments (ignite, bleed, poison) deal damage only from base damage, not total modifiers — ignores most added damage.
builds_that_need: Crit multi stacking DOT builds
Poison Assassin + crit multi stacking
Ignite builds that stack crit multi as DoT multi
breaks_for: Non-crit ailment builds that rely on total added damage for ignite/bleed/poison
keystones.notes: Difficult keystone to evaluate — crit multi translates to DoT multi at 30% efficiency. Most worthwhile in dedicated crit + ailment builds that already stack crit multi heavily.

keystones.name: Crimson Dance
keystones.effect: You can inflict Bleeding on an enemy up to 8 times. 50% less damage with Bleeding.
keystones.trade_off: Each bleed stack does 50% less damage — requires 8 stacks to equal 4x base bleed damage.
builds_that_need: Multi-hit bleed builds (Flicker Strike Bleed, Reave Bleed)
Gladiator builds with rapid multi-hit skills
breaks_for: Single-stack bleed builds relying on maximum damage from one application
keystones.notes: 8-stack bleed requires rapid multi-hit skills to reach full value. Not commonly taken — most bleed builds prefer single-stack approach with Gratuitous Violence.

keystones.name: Imbalanced Guard
keystones.effect: Maximum Damage Reduction for Hits is 90% (up from standard 75%). 50% less Armour.
keystones.trade_off: Halves your armour rating — you need much more base armour to reach the 90% cap.
builds_that_need: Extreme armour-stacking builds (Determination + Molten Shell)
Juggernaut Unbreakable + Imbalanced Guard combo
breaks_for: Standard armour builds not reaching the 90% threshold even with the boost
keystones.notes: Reaching 90% damage reduction requires enormous armour investment (hundreds of thousands). Extremely powerful for dedicated armour stacking but impractical for most builds.
